items.post_text: AAPL services revenue is the real story here, hardware is secondary. Long $200 calls.
iPhone 15 cycle looks weak compared to 14, China issue is real. Trimming.
Vision Pro production cut means launch slips. Not the FY24 catalyst people expect.
iPhone 15 Pro Max pre-orders are insane in my circle. Loaded calls.
Pre-order data looks bullish but supply constraints will pull demand into Q1.
Overheating reports being overblown. Apple already shipping fix. Buying weakness.
Core Ultra is a real product. AI PC narrative could finally lift Intel multiple.
Intel guide was a disaster. Foundry is bleeding cash. Holding puts.
Pentagon contract is bullish for foundry credibility. Long-dated calls.
18A roadmap looks credible if you trust Pat. Not for the impatient.
AMD eating Intel's lunch in server. Fundamentals don't justify rally.
Meta hiring slowdown means cost discipline finally arriving. Bullish into Q3.
Reality Labs is a money pit. Zuckerberg has tunnel vision on metaverse.
Ad market is getting crushed by macro. Meta exposure is too high. Out.
Reels finally clicking. If monetization scales, ad miss is overdone.
META getting destroyed -24% premarket. Capex guide is bonkers. Permabears vindicated.
Activist pressure could force discipline. Risk/reward looks asymmetric down here.
